market_regime: Risk-On Recovery with Geopolitical Overlay — VIX crashed to 19 (-29.7% 20d), tech (XLK +6.5%) and industrials (XLI +4.9%) leading recovery; defense/LNG/cyber structural tailwinds from Hormuz blockade and China export controls; energy (XLE -4.3%) lagging on demand destruction fears

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner doesn't monitor operational military deployment news — REMUS 620 live Hormuz minesweeping deployment (April 11) is concrete incremental revenue from active operations, not a contract announcement; geopolitical signal requires cross-domain synthesis

Scanner sees individual insider buys but misses orchestration: SIX C-suite executives (Chair, CFO, COO, CTO, CLO, CDO) buying simultaneously signals organizational conviction, not individual portfolio management — qualitatively different from a single insider buy

CEO's FIRST open-market purchase in 12 months after a 65% drawdown carries qualitatively different weight than routine insider activity; scanner captures dollar amounts, not the timing context of the first buy in 12 months at post-earnings lows

China Announcement 18 (April 4) requires connecting a foreign government policy document to a specific US mining company's competitive position — pure market data scanners cannot synthesize geopolitical export controls with equity positioning

Iran war / Volt Typhoon escalation creating nation-state cyber incident surge (35-45% historically) requires cross-domain knowledge synthesis (defense + cybersecurity + geopolitics) that pure market data scanning cannot perform

CEO buying $12M personal capital simultaneously with CMS finalizing Medicare Advantage rates requires joining two separate regulatory data streams (SEC Form 4 + HHS docket) — automated scanners don't cross-reference across regulatory filings of different agencies

Starboard 4-board-seat mandate and active TheFork sale require reading activist public statements and applying historical playbook pattern recognition (board seats → asset sales → spin-offs) that goes beyond fundamental data

Director buying $37.5M over 6 months with $26M in a 10-day April window is unprecedented escalating conviction; automated screens flag dollar amounts but don't synthesize the escalating pattern across 6 months of purchases

Dual activist convergence (JANA with existing board seats + Starboard independently accumulating) is a rare structural governance event requiring cross-referencing 13D/13G filings from multiple activist funds simultaneously

CEO + CFO + Director cluster buying immediately after record earnings (not distress) combined with silicon tapeout royalty inflection thesis requires semiconductor industry domain knowledge to interpret the NeuPro NPU licensing pipeline correctly
